name: showy_flower_vs_rest_exp01
description: Binary showy-flowering (1) vs non-showy (0) — exp01. Bottlebrush, Sausage tree, Frangipani and Kasod moved to negative: sub-canopy or ambiguous visibility.
notes: Bottlebrush (below canopy), Sausage tree (below canopy), Frangipani (sparse, sub-canopy), Kasod (ambiguous satellite signal) all moved to negative.
